text.title: Log Collection with Filebeat and Elastic Beats Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboards query `service:checkout` but events have `fields.service:checkout`; no results.
antipattern.fix: Set `fields_under_root: true` on every input. Re-index if necessary.

antipattern.symptom: Java stack traces appear as 50 separate log events; impossible to triage exceptions.
antipattern.root-cause: Source emits multiline; Filebeat default treats each line as event.
antipattern.fix: Add multiline.pattern + multiline.negate + multiline.match to the input.

antipattern.symptom: K8s pods cannot read /var/log because RBAC + mount missing.
antipattern.root-cause: DaemonSet manifest used sidecar mount points or skipped hostPath.
antipattern.fix: Use the standard DaemonSet manifest with hostPath mounts of /var/log/containers + /var/log/pods + /var/lib/docker/containers.

antipattern.symptom: Brief ES outage; Filebeat drops events with no retry; logs lost.
antipattern.root-cause: output.elasticsearch.bulk_max_size + retry settings left default; in some versions bulk error retry disabled.
